channel.description: Cycling podcast based in Michigan and mostly focused on bike mechanics, but it's only a guideline.

item.title: BSS - Commit to CX
item.itunes:title: BSS - Commit to CX
item.description:
Update on how I'm feeling and posting this show from April of 2020 that was posted on Cyclocross Today!

It's a show about the more subtle and amusing aspects of the world of Cyclocross. What are the lengths that we all go to for this sport that we love.

Today's show Commit to CX has 2 chapters that explore people heading off to participate in this crazy sport….and they do it largely on the faith that others will come through for them and things will work out; and in both cases they do. It's a testament to how our sport takes care of it's own.

Music on this show comes from Incompetech website. To find it simply follow the links below.

Inspiring Piano Melody by WinnieTheMoog Link: https://filmmusic.io/song/6078-inspiring-piano-melody License: http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/

Cheery Monday by Kevin MacLeod Link: https://incompetech.filmmusic.io/song/3495-cheery-monday License: http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Funkorama by Kevin MacLeod Link: https://incompetech.filmmusic.io/song/3788-funkorama License: http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Gymnopedie No. 2 by Kevin MacLeod Link: https://incompetech.filmmusic.io/song/3838-gymnopedie-no-2 License: http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Investigations by Kevin MacLeod Link: https://filmmusic.io/song/3924-investigations License: http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Reggae (Sketch) by Kevin MacLeod Link: https://filmmusic.io/song/4270-reggae-sketch- License: http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Sincerely by Kevin MacLeod Link: https://filmmusic.io/song/5033-sincerely License: http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ And extended license
 

New Summer Story by Winnie The Moog via extended license

item.description: With Scott down for the count for a while, David and Doug bring viewers up to speed on what happened and introduce a classic and timely episode of The Bike Shop Show.

item.title: Tour Day Vide
item.itunes:title: Tour Day Vide
item.description:
This week Mr. David Palan and I visit the rigs of the 2021 Tour Divide. Probably the largest spread of possible bike set up of any single form of cycling. Viewer questions from the Wheel build Challenge as well!

Bike Shop Show socials: Instagram - Twitter

item.title: BSS Wheel build Challenge 2.5
item.itunes:title: BSS Wheel build Challenge 2.5
item.description:
The final installment of the wheel build challenge! Mr. David Palan and I bring the latest wheelbuild challenge to a conclusion and send you out to build some wheels! We also get in a discussion of past and present warm showers guests that have stayed at my house over the years.

item.title: The Magic Word
item.itunes:title: The Magic Word
item.description:
This week Mr. David Palan and I are together again!! Doing the show in the same room for the first time in over a year!! It really makes the show much better although that's not that difficult really. We are joined by Katie from Common Cycle; an Ann Arbor based bike Co-op. Of course it gets bike geeky!!!

Bike Shop Show socials: Instagram - Twitter

item.title: New York is the Midwest
item.itunes:title: New York is the MIdwest
item.description:
This week for BSS0089 we get a visit in the shop from Sean Lally in Switzerland. He had invited us to a webNR for the release of the new SRAM Eagle GX AXS upgrade. So we chat about it. THEN! a visit from the only Elite American Man to compete in Cyclocross Worlds in 2021, Curtis White. Curtis finished top 20 at CX Worlds, something that is rare for the US Men, and stops by to talk about it as well as tell us about his new podcast. Then of course a couple of viewer questions!!

Bike Shop Show socials: Instagram - Twitter

Mr. David Palan socials: Instagram - Twitter

If you'd like to support our listener supported show check out our Patreon site at: https://www.patreon.com/bikeshopshow become a member at any level to unlock our bonus content including some blog posts, show out takes and more.

Subscribe to The Bike Shop Show

Social Media: Patreon - Instagram - Twitter

item.title: It's All About?
item.itunes:title: It's All About?
item.description:
BSS0087: This week Mr. David Palan and I reconnect with Katie Macarelli to discuss the Women on Wheels challenge that Elite is having on BKOOL cycling simulator.  We also get in the weeds a bit about the current state of cycling trying to recover from the COVID year we just had.
 
Then our old friend Miki Vuckovich stops by the shop and gives us a skateboarding lingo quiz with some interesting connections to cycling.
 
Bike Shop Show socials: Instagram - Twitter
 
Mr. David Palan socials: Instagram - Twitter
 
If you'd like to support our listener supported show check out our Patreon site at: https://www.patreon.com/bikeshopshow  become a member at any level to unlock our bonus content including some blog posts, show out takes and more.

item.title: BSS0086 - We Are Back..Again.
item.itunes:title: We Are Back. AGAIN
item.description:
Mr. David Palan and I are back after a long vacation of working our butts off!  We ask each other What are you workin on and answer viewer mail AND talk about format and name changes and where we are going in the future.

We are now supported via Patreon!!!  If you'd like to support the show go to Patreon.com/bikeshopshow .  There will be special segments posted there as well as other content.  Membership gives you access to our Discord server where we will be having regular chats and discussions.

As always, thanks for listening.
item.content:encoded:
Mr. David Palan and I are back after a long vacation of working our butts off! We ask each other What are you workin on and answer viewer mail AND talk about format and name changes and where we are going in the future.

We are now supported via Patreon!!! If you'd like to support the show go to Patreon.com/bikeshopshow . There will be special segments posted there as well as other content. Membership gives you access to our Discord server where we will be having regular chats and discussions.

As always, thanks for listening.

item.title: BSCX0085 - Alma GP Call up
item.itunes:title: Alma GP Call Up.
item.description:
This week I finally get the recording from the Alma Gp Call up out!  It was a great virtual event with some pro CX racers and trivia!!!  Not out typical show but tons of fun AND some info about future BSCX episodes for the coming months.

Send tech questions to bikeshopshow@gmail.com

Scott Dedenbach is on Instagram or twitter at @bikeshopcx

Mr. David Palan is on Twitter at @mrdavidpalan.

This podcast is also supported by Grimpeur Bros. Coffee

https://www.grimpeurbros.com/products/viewer-mail-wap-coffee

Head on over to their website and get yourself some Viewer Mail or Hello Cyclocross Friends to help support the network that you LOVE!!

Go check out WattBike!!

If your on mobile and want to listen through Spotify: click here.

item.title: BSCX0082 - Bag It
item.itunes:title: Bag It
item.description:
We know it's been a while but we have good reasons that we will get into at the beginning of the show.  What we lack in quality we make up for in quantity this week!!  David covers some bike bag info, we have a ton of GREAT viewer mail and we get it all caught up!! Also a quick Ad/Info drop on the Alma GP call up event where Stephen Hyde drops in!

Send tech questions to bikeshopshow@gmail.com or call 734-335-0262

item.title: BSCX0081 - Long Hot Summer
item.itunes:title: Long Hot Summer
item.description:
This week Dr T. joins us again as part of our guest host rotation and we talk about her bike set ups for some big rides she has coming up in "What Are Ya Workin on"?  I have a great chat with Chris McGovern about our cyclocross history, what he is doing for frame building etc.  We tell stories and realize that we actually have a bunch of stuff in common.  Then we finish it off with Viewer Mail of course!

 

Send tech questions to bikeshopshow@gmail.com or call 734-335-0262

Scott Dedenbach is on Instagram or twitter at @bikeshopcx

Mr. David Palan is on Twitter at @mrdavidpalan.

Dr. Tracy Berman can be found on twitter @DrTracyBerman

Chris McGovern can be found at McGovernCycles.com

This podcast is also supported by Grimpeur Bros. Coffee

https://www.grimpeurbros.com/products/viewer-mail-wap-coffee

Head on over to their website and get yourself some Viewer Mail or Hello Cyclocross Friends to help support the network that you LOVE!!

If your on mobile and want to listen through Spotify: click here.

item.title: BSCX0080 - This Is Bike Tap
item.itunes:title: This Is Bike Tap
item.description:
This week Mr. David Palan and I are joined by the PT Barnum of Michigan Cyclocross himself Dr. J.B. Hancock.  We have some interesting What are you working on stuff and a tap tech topic....Yeah that's right.  Viewer mail of course to close out the show where we learn what dedication to keeping old frames going is really about and the best podcast choice to pump up the volume while driving!

Send tech questions to bikeshopshow@gmail.com or call 734-335-0262

Scott Dedenbach is on Instagram or twitter at @bikeshopcx

Mr. David Palan is on Twitter at @mrdavidpalan.

J.B. Hancock is on Twitter at @TheAlmaGP

This podcast is also supported by Grimpeur Bros. Coffee

https://www.grimpeurbros.com/products/viewer-mail-wap-coffee

Head on over to their website and get yourself some Viewer Mail or Hello Cyclocross Friends to help support the network that you LOVE!!

item.title: BSCX0079 - Shameless Plug
item.itunes:title: Shameless Plug
item.description:
This week Mr. David Palan and I are joined by special guest host Tyler Cloutier!! We talk about mechanics and support when traveling to Europe for LONG periods as Tyler has been doing and David and I both have new toys oune involves sounds the other our fan.

Send tech questions to bikeshopshow@gmail.com or call 734-335-0262

Scott Dedenbach is on Instagram or twitter at @bikeshopcx

Mr. David Palan is on Twitter at @mrdavidpalan.

item.title: Preview - No Training Wheels
item.itunes:title: Preview - No Training Wheels
item.description:
As Steve Cullen of ButcherBox eloquently put it back in Episode 21, criteriums are America, they are the ultimate test of racers, machines, and teams. They are also a style of racing that lends well toward modern cycling media and with a huge fan engagement both at the event and remotely, the crit could quite possibly be the way forward for road racing in America. If we let it. And we see no reason why not, so we dive in with Scott Morris of USA Crits to talk about the league that he and others are working to create— a legitimate professional criterium league complete with standards, expectations, and savvy marketing.

Follow all the action from 2019 and in the future with USA Crits by visiting its website. Or find your favorite racer in any number of competitions and get ready to follow him or her in the future by going to Road-Results.com.

item.title: BSCX0065 - Cyclocross Reviews Ep002
item.itunes:title: Cyclocross Reviews - Women's CX Worlds 2007
item.description:
On this the second edition of Cyclocross reviews, as a special release episode we take look back again at the 2007 CX World championship race.  This time we look at the Women's race and Katie Compton's historic ride.

Send tech questions to bikeshopshow@gmail.com or call 734-335-0262

Scott Dedenbach is on Instagram at @bikeshopcx

Doug McClintock is on "The Gravel Lot" on this very network and is available @dubminion on twitter.
item.content:encoded:
On this the second edition of Cyclocross reviews, as a special release episode we take look back again at the 2007 CX World championship race. This time we look at the Women's race and Katie Compton's historic ride.

Send tech questions to bikeshopshow@gmail.com or call 734-335-0262

Scott Dedenbach is on Instagram at @bikeshopcx

Doug McClintock is on "The Gravel Lot" on this very network and is available @dubminion on twitter.
item.itunes:author: Scott Dedenbach

item.title: BSCX0064 - Tires and Bearings
item.itunes:title: Tires and Bearings
item.description:
This weeks show is chock full of smart people! Stephen Hyde! Ken Avery! and Mark Hinckley!!! We hear about Vitoria tires and how Stephen makes his tire choices.  Then Mark from SKF gives us more details about the SKF bearings that we introduced last week as part of the discussion.  It's a long but PACKED show for everyone!!!

Send tech questions to bikeshopshow@gmail.com or call 734-335-0262

Scott Dedenbach is on Instagram at @bikeshopcx

Mr. David Palan is on Twitter at @mrdavidpalan.

This podcast is also supported by Grimpeur Bros. Coffee

Head on over to their website and get yourself some Full Schleck or Hello Cyclocross Friends to help support the network that you LOVE!!

We are excited to announce our sponsor Worx.  Check out yourcleanbike.com and use our discount code CLEANBIKE for 15% off your hydroshot purchase!

TNR-Tape ! We are so glad to be partnering with these folks again!

Health IQ!!! Health IQ.com/WAP

Whoop!! Check it out at Whoop.com and use code bikeshop for 15% discount!

If your on mobile and want to listen through Spotify: click here.

Thanks as always for tuning in. If this is your first time listening, you can explore the rest of our episodes here.

Bike Shop CX is part of the Wide Angle Podium podcast network. Check out  www.wideanglepodium.com, listen to the shows, and consider becoming a member.

item.title: BSCX0063 - DTDTIE Special
item.itunes:title: DTDTIE - Special
item.description:
I'm talking to Neil Mansfield from The Crosscast over in Nottingham about the UK National Trophy series.  Something that would be a great model for the US going forward.  We also chat about the current UCI...I don't know what to call it?...Schedule??? that came out this week from Flanders Classics and then talk about the 2 big races from this past weekend.

 

If your on mobile and want to listen through Spotify: click here.

Thanks as always for tuning in. If this is your first time listening, you can explore the rest of our episodes here.

Bike Shop CX is part of the Wide Angle Podium podcast network. Check out  www.wideanglepodium.com, listen to the shows, and consider becoming a member.

item.title: BSCX0062 - ShiftDartBender
item.itunes:title: ShiftDartBender
item.description:
This weeks show is out a bit early because it might take you an extra day to listen to it! Back to some tech talk finally AND we had to get out non-shiz number talking in too!! We cover rear derailleur adjustments, review the Stan's Notubes Dart and the Cane Creek Hellbender BB.  Then talk some UCI World Cup issues AND it's Pledge drive time!!!!

Send tech questions to bikeshopshow@gmail.com or call 734-335-0262

Scott Dedenbach is on Instagram at @bikeshopcx

item.title: BSCX0061 - World Cup Rap Up
item.itunes:title: World Cup Rap Up
item.description:
We close out our World Cup travels with fellow traveler and #aprilcxchallenge co-winner Matt Henderson from Giant Bicycles.  I also chat with Helen and Stef Wyman about the Helen 100 and Challenge tires, while at Waterloo WC.  Next show it's back to our regularly scheduled Tech topics and a HUGE announcement as we start our pledge drive month!  You'll want to hear what you as a Bike Shop CX supporter are doing!

This week Mr. David Palan and I try to get all caught up on the viewer questions so we dedicate most of the show to getting through them.  We also talk about the BIG news coming up for the TREK CX cup!!!!

 

Send tech questions to bikeshopshow@gmail.com

Scott Dedenbach is on Instagram at @bikeshopcx

Mr. David Palan is on Twitter at @mrdavidpalan.

This podcast is also supported by Grimpeur Bros. Coffee

Head on over to their website and get yourself some Full Schleck to help support the network that you LOVE!!

Health IQ!!! Health IQ.com/WAP

If your on mobile and want to listen through Spotify: click here.

Thanks as always for tuning in. If this is your first time listening, you can explore the rest of our episodes here.

Bike Shop CX is part of the Wide Angle Podium podcast network. Check out  www.wideanglepodium.com, listen to the shows, and consider becoming a member.

item.title: BSCX0043 - Stem Jargon
item.itunes:title: Stem Jargon
item.description:
This week we do a long "What Are You Workin on"? and have some funny stories.  Then we tackle some stem jargon that should really confuse you then we answer a long overdue listener question.

The tool that Mr. David Palan talks about can be found here: Stem Comparison tool!

Scott Dedenbach is on Twitter at @bikeshopcx @cyclocrossnet.

This podcast is also supported by Grimpeur Bros. Coffee

item.title: BSCX Special - European Vacation
item.itunes:title: European Vacation
item.description:
So many American riders are over in Europe right now partaking of the World Cup races and in general enjoying the Belgian Christmas period.  I do some short notice skype chats with three of them.  Jen Malik, Tyler Cloutier, Alex Morton AND the return of The Ruckus Lady!!!

Scott Dedenbach is on Twitter at @bikeshopcx @cyclocrossnet.

This podcast is also supported by Grimpeur Bros. Coffee

B-Ju by Philly Run

item.title: BSCX0036 - Mechanical Discs
item.itunes:title: Mechanical Discs
item.description:
I start off this weeks show with a discussion with Mark Legg on Katie's rolled tire at the TREK world cup.  It's some great insight into being a responsible mechanic.  Then Mr. David Palan and I talk about mechanical disc brake adjustments and of course, answer viewer questions.

Scott Dedenbach is on Twitter at @bikeshopcx @cyclocrossnet.

item.title: BSCX0018 - Nationals Review
item.itunes:title: Nationals Review
item.description:
Scott and David run down everything that happened in Reno for the U.S. Cyclocross National Championships. Scott actually got to pit for Katie Compton as she went on to win her 14th consecutive cyclocross nationals and David got to pit for Rebecca Gross who finished 9th.  Also a quick interview with Brook Watts discussing Reno Cross next fall and several other tidbits from the venue.

Scott Dedenbach is on Twitter at @cyclocrossnet.

Mr. David Palan is on Twitter at @mrdavidpalan.

This episode is sponsored by Endura Sport. Visit them at www.endurasport.com and get 20 percent off THE ENTIRE CATALOG by using the code: wideangle20. Let's make this happen, cyclocross friends.

This podcast is also supported by Health IQ, a life insurance company that celebrates the health conscious, including cyclists. Visit healthiq.com/bikeshop to learn more & get a free quote, or check out their life insurance FAQ page to get your questions answered.

Our other contributing sponsor is TNR tape, the number pinning solution that you will love!  Visit tnrtape.com for more info or to purchase some for yourself.

Thanks as always for tuning in. If this is your first time listening, you can explore the rest of our episodes here. 

Bike Shop CX is part of the Wide Angle Podium podcast network. Check out  www.wideanglepodium.com, listen to the shows, and consider becoming a member.

Check out the new Wide Angle Podium t-shirts and kit at icksnay.myshopify.com/collections/wide-angle-podium.

Our third show in as many weeks!  We are finishing off the year with our promised tubeless tire discussion with Drew Esherick from the Stan's No Tubes CX team!  We talk about tubeless and answer viewer questions about all sorts of stuff.  Check it out before you head out to Reno CX Nats!

item.title: BSCX0016 - Tubulars with Mark Legg
item.itunes:title: Tubulars with Mark Legg
item.description:
This week! (Yes it's only been 1 week!) I have a long awaited chat with Mark Legg about Tubular tires.  Mark goes through some of his tubular gluing techniques, talks about things he has run into while wrenching on Katie's bikes and we answer some listener questions!  This is part one of out Pre-Nationals tire discussion.  

 

Health IQ

Send questions to: BikeShopShow@gmail.com

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bikeshopcx/

Twitter: @bikeshopcx

item.title: BSCX0011 - Pitbag
item.itunes:title: Pitbag
item.description: This week we get back to tech!  The long awaited pitbag episode!  Mr. David Palan and I go through my pitbag and what I carry with me into the cx pit.  Then we of course go on and answer all the listener questions and discuss entry into our Trouble North T-shirt give away contest.  Hope you like it.

item.title: BSCX0010 - World Cup Week
item.itunes:title: World Cup Week
item.description: This week we get away from the usual tech talk to tell some stories about world cup week.  Got to meet a lot of podcast viewers at the world cup races this week and had a great time.  Listen if you want to hear how Mr. David Palan almost caused an international corn incident at TREK cxc.  Also we start our Trouble North signed Kaitie Keough Tee shirt give away!

Also we start our Trouble North signed Kaitie Keough Tee shirt give away!

item.title: BSCX003-Shimano8000, AmericanClassic
item.itunes:title: American Classic
item.description:
Mr. David Palan is back with me IN studio and almost on Skype for the latest edition of Bike Shop CX.  We go over and give our thoughts on the new Ultegra 8000 groupset.  As usual you should take it with a grain of salt.  Then I get to interview Bill Shook, the founder of American Classic the wheel company, we discuss their history a little bit and what some of his wheel design theory is.

On the next show we will read listener questions so send more questions to bikeshopshow@gmail.com

item.title: BSCX0002-Marian
item.itunes:title: Marian
item.description:
On this show I talk with Dean Peterson and Micheal Kubancsek from Marian University.  Their team has been at the top of the national collegiate scene many times.  We talk about their new student cycling mechanic program that they are starting and how they approach covering a huge team of riders for a race.

Marian University Cycling:

http://www.muknights.com/sport/0/21.php

item.title: BSCX0001-Reboot
item.itunes:title: Reboot
item.description: The return of The Bike Shop Show...well sort of.  Scott and Mr. David Palan just sit down and talk about the slightly new direction of the show and where we are planning on going with it down the road.  We do make fun of some crazy bike mods and mechanicing ....Shhhh...but we are just kidding friends, we are all part of this crazy bike world!

item.title: Bike Shop Show 00124 - Fit - Fluid - HIrobel
item.itunes:title: Fit Fluid Hirobel
item.description: We are back with info on Mr. David Palan's first BG fit school experience, I discuss some specifics about hydraulic brake fluid and we finish off with an interview with Brandon Hirokawa from Hirobel Cycling Solutions discussing their amazing product.

item.title: Show00123 - SDG - HubPress
item.itunes:title: Hub Press
item.description: On this show I talk with David Sheek from SDG components.  Amazing stuff technology involved in one of the bike components that you might not think of when it comes to innovation is saddles but SDG is doing incredible things! Then I review and discuss Zipp 30 course wheels with the 77/177 hub! while I'm at it i review the Park HBP-1 all new hub bearing press!!
